synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20927 Oracle Linux 9 linuxptp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20927
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20927

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20927.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
linuxptp-4.4-4.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
linuxptp-4.4-4.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/linuxptp-4.4-4.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[4.4-4]
- handle missing pulses in ts2phc (RHEL-112193)
